research_note.summary: The third-source line-range-first repeat completed naturally under the thinking-enabled configuration and produced the portfolio's cleanest locator result: three of three support-valid candidates with warranted exact labels and zero demotions, on an ASR-degraded source, within entry caps. Source-generality evidence for line-range-first is now recorded across a third source.
what_worked: Line-range-first repeated on a third, messier source: 3/3 support-valid with tight boundaries and warranted exact labels.
Entry caps were respected under thinking mode in this narrow contract, unlike the broader grounded contract in long-context pilot 004.
The deterministic local-wrapping selection procedure (50-character textwrap over an unwrapped ASR transcript) produced line coordinates the model used accurately.
The model's single failure note independently identified line-numbering stability as the real dependency, matching the lab's own lesson that segmentation is a local responsibility.
Locator confidence showed spread (0.95) rather than pilot 004's flat 1.0.
what_failed: No structural or locator failures occurred in this run; residual limitations are recorded rather than failures.
The zero-entry unsupported-claim report is not comprehensive hallucination filtering.
Claim paraphrases normalized an ASR garble without flagging it; acceptable here but a future contract could ask for explicit transcription-noise flags.
negative_results: None in this run; the prior negative lessons (cap sizing for thinking mode, entry-cap softness in broad contracts) were applied rather than re-observed.
reusable_by_other_labs: Deterministic local wrapping of unwrapped ASR transcripts (recorded width, recorded word offsets, hash after wrapping) is a workable selection procedure for line-range methods.
Narrow contracts appear to hold entry caps under thinking mode better than broad contracts; cap enforcement should still be local.

The line-range-first division of labor — model proposes ranges, local tooling validates then computes offsets and hashes — has now repeated across two labs, two contracts, three sources, and both thinking modes.
do_not_repeat: Do not treat a 3/3 single-run result as more than one repetition; the graduation case rests on the accumulated record set, not this run alone.
Do not skip recording the wrapping procedure when selecting from unwrapped transcripts; line coordinates are meaningless without it.
Do not copy raw source text, raw model output, reasoning traces, provider payloads, or prompt traces into committed records or currentness docs.
research_note.evidence_disclaimer: This is a proposal-only live LLM pilot record, not validation, product evidence, strategy evidence, financial advice, live-trading authority, or architecture.
